title: AURORA, Timmy, Shaun the Sheep, Soft Toy, White
features: Based upon the popular TV/Movie Character Timmy Sheep from Shaun the Sheep
Adorably cute Timmy soft toy holding his teddy bear
Soft and extremely touchable Timmy Sheep soft toy made with high quality materials.
description: From the manufacturer Shaun the Sheep Timmy Soft Toy Part of the Shaun the Sheep family, Shaun the Sheep Timmy Soft Toy is the toddler in the flock. He is an adorable character, usually portrayed with his yellow dummy in his mouth and carrying an orange teddy bear. Not quite as innocent as he looks he has an alarming propensity for getting into dangerous situations. Made from the softest and highest quality materials, Shaun the Sheep Timmy Soft Toy is a super soft baby lamb, holding his teddy bear.
